title: Github project support with the existing integration
excerpt: I am strong monday.com user within my company and are managing multiple projects either on Monday or in Github. I very much appreciate the Github-Monday.com interface and the provided templates but I am missing the possi…

posts.author: DennisBerg (Dennis Berg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am strong monday.com user within my company and are managing multiple projects either on Monday or in Github. I very much appreciate the Github-Monday.com interface and the provided templates but I am missing the possibility to reach out to the data stored within Github projects. Specially all the possibilities around start date and end date as well as milestones which are great in Github cannot be displayed in Monday.com because the interface works only with the repo and not with the project(s) to which an item can be associated with.

It would be outstanding if an interface to Github projects could be provided. This would definitely support the case for having Monday.com as the project management environment rather than Github.
